title: bellis annua subsp. minuta
intro: Bellis annua subsp. minuta, also known as dwarf dandelion, is a small, annual plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, closely related to the common dandelion. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bellis annua subsp. minuta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
